message:
ci: trigger CI on master branch (not just main)

The repository uses 'master' as the default branch, but the CI
workflow was only configured to trigger on 'main'. Added 'master'
to the branch list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@ name: CI
 
 on:
   push:
-    branches: [main]
+    branches: [master, main]
   pull_request:
   workflow_dispatch:
